name: 1989 3rd Place: Cinnamon Toffee Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, cream together the butter and brown sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Beat in the egg, vanilla, ground cinnamon, and salt.
4. Gradually stir in the flour until a dough forms.
5. Roll out the dough on a floured surface to fit a 9x13 inch baking dish.
6. Spread evenly with the topping mixture.
7. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Allow to cool completely before cutting into squares.
Mmmmm---------------
